reasoning: The staff notes explicitly recommend approval as a VIP exception due to the company's delayed response causing the policy violation (90 days past purchase vs 30-day policy). Customer has high lifetime value ($6,200 across 42 orders) with only 2 prior refunds. The order shows 'Shipped' status but the internal note states our delay in responding to their day-32 contact justifies exception approval to retain this valuable customer relationship.
